items.headline: Booking Holdings’ (BKNG) Priceline Upgrades AI Assistant Penny With Anthropic’s Claude Integration
items.summary: Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:BKNG) is one of the most promising long-term stocks to buy according to analysts. On June 3, Priceline, a subsidiary and primary brand of Booking Holdings, upgraded its AI travel assistant, Penny, by integrating Anthropic’s Claude into its proprietary tech stack. This agentic tool allows users to move from initial travel ideas […]

items.headline: Top Value Investor Says Adobe Stock Is ‘Very Compelling’ Despite AI Threat
items.summary: Value investor Tobias Carlisle made a contrarian case for Adobe (NASDAQ:ADBE) on a recent episode of The Investor’s Podcast, telling co-hosts Stig Brodersen and Hari Ramachandra that “I think the valuation’s very compelling” and pointing to a “big discount” and “a lot of buybacks” at the creative software giant. items.headline: Booking Holdings (BKNG) Partners With The Trade Desk On Travel Advertising
items.summary: Booking Holdings, which trades as NasdaqGS:BKNG, has announced a partnership with The Trade Desk to power data driven travel advertising across its platforms. The collaboration will use high intent travel data from brands such as Booking.com, Agoda, KAYAK, and Priceline for more targeted campaigns on the open internet. The news arrives with Booking Holdings shares at $171.78, after a gain of 5% over the past week and 11.2% over the past month. For investors tracking Booking Holdings, the...

items.headline: Booking Holdings (BKNG) Stock Could Be 96.9% Below Fair Value After Its 2026 Slide
items.summary: Booking Holdings (BKNG) has drawn attention after recent trading left the stock about 19% lower year to date, even as its past 3 years total return and 5 years total return remain significantly positive. See our latest analysis for Booking Holdings. At a share price of US$171.78, Booking Holdings has staged a short term rebound, with the 7 day share price return of 5.01% and 30 day share price return of 11.16% partly offsetting the year to date share price decline of 19.32%.
